purpose: AI-powered Legal Document Intelligence platform for Vanmerven Law Firm, automating document reviews, compliance monitoring, and legal workflow management

users.primary: Legal team at Vanmerven Law Firm (in-house counsel, paralegals, legal ops)

ai_agents.LEXA: Legal Examination & Assessment Agent - client profiling, priority tier calculation
ai_agents.CLARA: Comprehensive Legal Analysis & Review Agent - deep-dive case reviews
ai_agents.DORA: Documentation & Outreach Retrieval Agent - document collection and tracking
ai_agents.ARIA: Automated Review, Identification & Analysis Agent - document analysis, issue identification
ai_agents.RITA: Report Intelligence & Threat Assessment Agent - report generation
ai_agents.ATLAS: Action Tracking & Legal Advisory System Agent - action items, escalation
ai_agents.AURA: Automated Upload & Recognition Agent - document extraction, deduplication
